content.en:
Xiao Yue has practiced the Gate of Eternity, which does not mean that he has only practiced this magical power.

There are countless supernatural powers in the domain realm, many of which are more rebellious supernatural powers, Ye Tian's cultivation level is too high now, and he can't look down on the chaotic supernatural powers, so he assists Xiao Yue to practice these supernatural powers.

With Ye Tian's help, Xiao Yue can easily be given various talents, not to mention three fusion talents, even if it is four fusion talents, it is only a matter of time.

For example, the Gate of Eternity is a top-notch defensive Chaos Divine Power, which is extremely famous in the Divine Heaven Realm, and this Divine Power is one of the Chaos Divine Powers created by the Eternal Divine Sect of the Divine Heaven Realm.

The Gate of Eternity, the Eternal Spear, and the Eternal Golden Light are called the Eternal Three Divine Powers, and Ye Tian happened to obtain the inheritance of these three Chaos Divine Powers, and gave them to Xiao Yue one by one.

Now, Xiao Yue has all cultivated the three Chaos Divine Powers of the Eternal Gate, the Eternal Spear, and the Eternal Golden Light, but it is a pity that the Divine General will not be able to cultivate the Chaos Divine Power to the entry level, let alone cultivate it to a higher realm.

If Xiao Yue was a Heavenly Monarch, with the help of a Heavenly Soul Pill, it would be enough to cultivate all three Chaos Divine Powers to the extreme level.

Because of this, it was a waste of opportunity for the god to refine Xiao Yue at the level of a Heavenly Soul Pill.

However, one person can refine nine Heavenly Soul Pills in his lifetime, even if it is a bit wasteful, it is not serious.

Now.

Xiao Yue's attack on the Killing Spirit was the Eternal Spear, which was an offensive chaos supernatural power.

In the ring.

An eternal spear that exuded endless divine power instantly condensed and turned into a golden light, stabbing at the Killing Spirit.

Under the lock of the Eternal Spear, the Slayer shuddered.

This is a real big crisis!

Burst!

The Spear of Eternity pierced through the body of the Slayer, but under the life-saving objects, the Slayer was not killed, but wounded.

Seeing that the Eternal Spear did not kill the Killing Spirit, Xiao Yue also sighed a little.

If it was to limit the life-saving thing, her attack would be enough to kill the Killing Spirit in an instant.

But treasures are also a kind of strength and heritage, and it is impossible for the four transcendent forces to prohibit life-saving things, and it is impossible for some gods and generals who rely on treasures to become famous to ban treasures.

Otherwise, you don't have to compete for strength, just use the ancestral monument ranking to determine the strength.

The killing spirit was pierced through the body by the Eternal Spear, and the whole person was also the rest of his life, no longer hiding his treasures, and one by one the one-time treasures of the attack type were urged.

These one-time treasures do not contain the power of other strong people, otherwise they are not allowed to be used, and the power that erupts from these treasures is completely the power of the weapon itself, although such a killing weapon is not very powerful, but it is still very deterrent for the nine-star peak god general.

What's more, the one-time big killing weapon taken out by a disciple of a transcendent force like Killing Spirit is naturally a truly top-notch big killing weapon, and the value of a big killing weapon is no less than a half-way weapon.

Woohoo!!

The three big killing weapons came in an instant, as if blocking Xiao Yue's escape space.

But in an instant, Xiao Yue cast an eternal golden light, breaking the blockade at an unimaginable speed, dodging the three big killing weapons.

This scene completely stunned countless True Monarchs and Dao Ancestor incarnations!

After all, judging from the normal situation, even a ten-star god general may not be able to dodge this kind of big killing weapon, but Xiao Yue dodged three big killing weapons with the strength of the nine-star peak.

It can be seen that the Eternal Golden Light, a Chaos Divine Power, is much more powerful than the Void Shifting Technique, in terms of speed.

As time passed, the Killing Spirit was completely suppressed, and there was no way to fight back.

At this time, many people also truly realized the power of the top Chaos Divine Power of the Divine Heaven Realm, and even some Heavenly Monarchs and True Monarchs were thinking about whether they should spend some big money to cultivate a Domain Realm Chaos Divine Power.

"I throw in the towel!"

In the ring, the Killing Spirit suddenly spoke.

He didn't want to admit defeat, but he couldn't admit defeat anymore.

He had consumed a lot of life-preserving things, some of which were rare among the transcendent forces and were difficult to replenish.

If he continues to fight, his life-saving things will definitely be exhausted, and he may even be killed.

But even if he is not killed, but the life-saving things on his body are exhausted, and the battle behind him will be more difficult.

At this moment, he truly realized that there were many gods and generals in the chaos who were more powerful than him, and he was not qualified to be arrogant.

Killing Spirit admits defeat, which means that Xiao Yue won the first place in the third group with a hundred wins.

Of course, the first and second places are of little substantive use, but at least in the third round, you can match weaker opponents and not play the first place in the other groups at the beginning, which is the only benefit.

It didn't take long for the third group to be over, and the second place was Slayer.

Then, the competitions of the other groups ended one by one.

With the end of this round, a total of 100 gods will advance to the next round.

But the other gods still have a chance to challenge, but at least the strength is close to these 100 gods to be eligible to challenge, so the lower bracket has another game, and a total of 100 gods will be qualified to challenge.

However, there will only be six gods who will truly succeed in the challenge.

At this point, the 100 gods who will advance to the next round have been finalized.

At this time, the incarnation of the Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor appeared.

"The 100 god generals who have qualified for the next round of the competition, you should have been curious about how many places there are in the talent ancestral pool, but now I can tell you that there are about 10 places in total, and this is still the domain fragment that has not been born for countless years, and slowly accumulating energy to have so many places. Therefore, every place is extremely precious. "

After the Wheel Wind Dao Ancestor finished speaking, the 100 god generals all looked nervous.

Everyone wants to get the quota of the Talent Ancestral Pool, and once they get this place, they definitely have the hope of becoming the real top big names in this realm in this era in the future.

Through the forces behind them, they are very aware of the importance of Dao-level natal talent, which is no less than the opportunity to become a Dao Ancestor, and even far beyond the opportunity to become a Dao Ancestor!

For the sake of the quota of the talent ancestral pool, they can do whatever it takes, and even to a certain extent, they are willing to self-destruct a part of their potential.

After all, once you enter the talent ancestral pool, the potential can definitely be easily made up.

can compete for 100 god generals, and compete for only 10 places, it can be said that the competition is so big.

But either way, there's a chance for everyone.

Because judging from the current level of strength, the 100 god generals present have the strength of the nine-star late god generals at the lowest, and the strongest are only the nine-star peak god generals.

But in fact, everyone knows very well that there are definitely ten star gods among these gods, but everyone hides their strength, and it is not easy to expose their strength until the end.

In anticipation of everyone, Lunfeng Daozu announced the way of the final round of the competition.

"For the sake of fairness and justice, 100 god generals need to fight each other one by one, a total of 99 battles, and the final number of victories will determine the winner!"

This announcement represents the arrival of the most exciting round of the battle for the place of the talent ancestral pool, and also represents the arrival of a series of tragic battles!
